deadline_notes: Biennial; license number determines active year. Odd license#: Jan 1, 2025 – Dec 31, 2026 (ACTIVE). Even license#: Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027.
notes: 80hr if ≥3000 engagement hours; 60hr otherwise. 16hr A&A for attest CPAs (8hr/yr). Personal development cap: 8hr for 60-hr track / 12hr for 80-hr track. Behavioral Ethics & HR/Personnel EXCLUDED from CPE.
